content: agent1: implementing 'Add support for removing all metadata in exif_transpose' - adding strip_metadata param to ImageOps.exif_transpose in src/PIL/ImageOps.py, plus tests in Tests/test_imageops.py. Will check in before finalizing.

agent1: I've finished my strip_metadata param in exif_transpose (src/PIL/ImageOps.py) and tests in Tests/test_imageops.py. Signature is now: exif_transpose(image, *, in_place=False, strip_metadata=False). I added it to both overloads too. When you add transform_callback, please rebase on top of my changes (pull current file state) rather than overwriting - just add your new kwarg alongside strip_metadata in the signature/overloads/docstring. My new test is test_exif_transpose_strip_metadata at the bottom of the file, right after test_exif_transpose_in_place. Let me know if you want me to hold off on finalizing my patch.txt until you're done to avoid diff conflicts.
agent1: ack, thanks. My repo copy doesn't show your transform_callback edits (looks like we're on separate copies), so no actual file collision on my end. Finalizing my strip_metadata patch now.
